usage: Select format via concept_selector or explicit format_id. Instantiate with production_templates.build_longform_script(). Every shot video_prompt must carry identity/set continuity prefix + style locks + action + end_guard for seamless assembly.
global_guardrails: synthetic talent only — no real person likeness, no celebrity mimicry
end guard mandatory on every generated segment for seamless assembly
one set_id and one style_id per scene — never blend mid-take
lip-sync speech_text must appear in video_prompt when role is speaking
duration per shot 5–15s (API clip discipline); prefer 7–9s for seamless extend chains
never hold dead stillness or dead frame at segment end

compose_contract.speech_optional_when: b_roll or silent_establishing roles omit lip-sync clause

documentary-host.name: Documentary Host
documentary-host.description: Prestige host-led documentary — corpus-first, attested/reconstructed honesty, Archive desk continuity.

camera.secondary: locked-off medium with insert B-roll cutaways

documentary-host.identity_continuity_lock: CONTINUITY LOCK @David-001: identical host face, charcoal sweater, Archive desk, brass lamp, same eye-line — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut.
documentary-host.voice_suffix: mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible never stuffy, synthetic host only
guardrails: attested vs reconstructed labels on screen when applicable
never claim recording when pronunciation is reconstructed
corpus-first method — no invention without evidence
Archive set and Documentary Prestige style locked for entire host scene
re-ground brass lamp 3200K every 2 segments in long-form

shot_blueprints.action_template: Host seated at Archive worktable, warm brass lamplight, speaks calmly to camera.
shot_blueprints.speech_placeholder: [HOOK — who you are and what the audience will hear]

shot_blueprints.pacing_beat: stakes — what was lost or unknown
shot_blueprints.action_template: Same take continues — host reflects, manuscripts behind, same desk and lamp.
shot_blueprints.speech_placeholder: [STAKES — why this matters, what silence cost]

shot_blueprints.action_template: Host leans slightly toward camera, intent, signature question moment.
Steady close-up, knowing pause, second half of signature beat.
shot_blueprints.speech_placeholder: [PROOF QUESTION — how do we prove it]

shot_blueprints.action_template: Host gestures to open codex on worktable, explaining corpus-first method.
Host direct to camera, calm authority on attested vs reconstructed.
Host delivers example pronunciation or excerpt, scholarly tone, on-screen labels visible.
shot_blueprints.speech_placeholder: [DEMONSTRATION — example line with IPA if applicable]

shot_blueprints.action_template: Warm inviting close, slight smile, gentle settle; end on hand gesture mid-motion.

narrative-short-film.name: Narrative / Short Film
narrative-short-film.description: Beat-driven cinematic short — character arc in under 90s, theatrical lighting, motivated camera.

camera.secondary: rack focus motivated by story beat

narrative-short-film.identity_continuity_lock: CONTINUITY LOCK @Talent-001: identical character face, wardrobe, hair, same eye-line and blocking — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut.
narrative-short-film.voice_suffix: naturalistic dialogue delivery, motivated breath, cinematic intimacy, synthetic talent only
guardrails: PG-13 default — no explicit violence framing, no gore linger
synthetic talent only — no real person likeness
one location per scene unless blueprint marks scene_break
character wardrobe and side-light direction locked across segments
finish every segment on motion or emotional peak — never dead hold

shot_blueprints.camera: wide static or slow crane down
shot_blueprints.action_template: Establishing wide of location, atmospheric, no dialogue required.
Character enters frame or revealed in medium shot, motivated side key.
Inciting event lands — character reacts, tension enters.
Close-up, subtext in eyes, rack focus to story object if present.
Turning point — decision, revelation, or reversal.
Emotional peak — gesture, glance, or physical beat at maximum tension.

shot_blueprints.camera: pull back or hold on button
shot_blueprints.action_template: Resolution beat — release, irony, or quiet button; end on motion.

conversational-companion.name: Conversational / Companion (SFW)
conversational-companion.description: Warm SFW companion dialogue — approachable intimacy, lifestyle set, PG editorial guardrails.
conversational-companion.identity_continuity_lock: CONTINUITY LOCK @Companion-001: identical companion face, wardrobe, apartment set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut.
conversational-companion.voice_suffix: warm approachable conversational voice, attentive listener energy, natural breath, synthetic companion only
guardrails: SFW mandatory — PG rating, no explicit content, no suggestive framing
no lingerie, swimwear, or bedroom intimacy staging
companion is supportive friend energy — not romantic roleplay
synthetic companion only — no real person likeness
fully clothed wardrobe — lifestyle casual or smart-casual only
no medical, legal, or financial advice presented as professional counsel

shot_blueprints.action_template: Companion greets viewer warmly, relaxed posture on sofa, soft daylight.
Companion listens attentively, nodding, empathetic micro-expressions.
Companion shares main thought calmly, open hand gesture, trustworthy tone.
Brief reflective pause, soft breath, inviting viewer reflection.
Encouraging close, genuine smile, supportive hand gesture.
Soft sign-off, wave or hand settle mid-motion, warm eye contact.

explainer-ad.name: Explainer / Ad
explainer-ad.description: Brisk product or concept explainer — hook-problem-solution-CTA, neutral or high-key, trust-through-clarity.

camera.secondary: product hero push-in on solution beat

explainer-ad.identity_continuity_lock: CONTINUITY LOCK @Presenter-001: identical presenter face, wardrobe, neutral set, same eye-line — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut.
explainer-ad.voice_suffix: clear confident presenter voice, brisk diction, trustworthy product tone, synthetic presenter only
guardrails: no unsubstantiated claims — mark [CLAIM REQUIRES VERIFICATION] in speech until legal approves
brand-safe language — no competitor bashing unless scripted and approved
synthetic presenter only — no real person likeness
accurate color reproduction for product shots when product visible
CTA must be single clear action — one verb, one destination

shot_blueprints.action_template: Presenter addresses camera directly, crisp opener, neutral backdrop.
shot_blueprints.speech_placeholder: [HOOK — problem or question in 8 words max]

shot_blueprints.action_template: Presenter names the pain point, empathetic but brisk.

shot_blueprints.camera: slow push to product or presenter
shot_blueprints.action_template: Solution reveal — product or concept introduced, clean clinical lighting.
shot_blueprints.speech_placeholder: [SOLUTION — what it is in one sentence]

shot_blueprints.action_template: First benefit demonstrated or stated with presentational gesture.
Second benefit, maintain axis and lighting continuity.
Clear CTA, presenter points or open-palm invite, end on gesture peak.
shot_blueprints.speech_placeholder: [CTA — single action: visit, try, sign up]

concept_selector.description: Scores concept text against format signals; highest score wins unless format_id is explicit.
